title: New AE2 Textures Backport
description: Use the textures of the new AE2 in the 1.12.2 version of Minecraft
body:
Hi there! Hello! It's me! I'm InterPlay!

I know that, some times, you like to play with some old mods that haven't been updated to newer versions of Minecraft, like Thaumcraft, Bibliocraft, or Better Foliage and others. These are some great examples of mods that didn't got updated to the latest versions of Minecraft, and some times, we face what we call "nostalgia" when we play them again. And it's always a good time. But also, some times we wish some of them, that got updated, had the same look and feel they have today. Well... now your problems are no longer! At least for this mod in particular. Let me present to you the:

![Texturepack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93784f9a01ef5463a4bbae768ce5013d7af4b4d2.png)

That's right! With this resource pack enabled you will be able to play Applied Energistcs 2 with the same look, and hopefully the feel, it have these days. All the blocks, items and machines UIs got their textures updated to match the newst versions of the mod. Now you can play old modpacks without feeling old. See some examples of what have been updated below.

![me controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc94a62e677087e603edec5827f2d30bc84b0d0.png)
![me drives](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869b251d833a3f3a8d48b590f1daa4215da9ddf2.png)
![AE2 addons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/331b7a80e46dca8cf3ec0a68b9cf5e29755defad.png)
